subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Thy recent letter dated 25 Shawwal 1328 was perused, regarding the condition of the venerable sheikhs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه اخیر بتاریخ ۲۵ شوال ۱۳۲۸ ملاحظه گردید کیفیت حضرات مشایخ را
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Hands of the Cause, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @wisdom [hikmat]
